emptyConv.noConvSub: Pick one on the left, or click + to start a new one.
emptyConv.newConvSub: Tell me what you need. Use @ to reference functions, handlers, workflows, skills, or documents.

toast.convGoneDesc: Returned to conversation list. Pick one or start a new one.

composer.placeholderStreaming: Agent is working, Esc to stop

error.insufficientBalance: Insufficient balance at the LLM provider. Top up your account or switch to a different provider in settings.
error.invalidApiKey: API Key is invalid or expired. Re-enter it in settings.
error.rateLimit: Too many requests. Wait a few seconds and try again, or switch providers.
error.modelNotFound: This model ID does not exist at the provider. Switch to a valid model in settings.
error.contextLength: Context is too long. Start a new conversation or let the agent compact it.
error.notConfigured: Model or API Key is not configured. Check your settings.
error.providerError: The LLM provider returned an error. See raw message below.

noApiKey.title: Add an API Key
noApiKey.sub: An LLM API Key is required. It stays on this machine at

noModel.title: Pick a model
noModel.sub: You have a key. Select a model for chat and you're ready to go.

ask.emptyTitle: No agent is waiting for you
ask.emptyBody: When an agent needs your input during a run, it will appear here.
ask.waitingLabel: Agent is waiting for your input
ask.noOptionsHint: (No options yet — waiting for the agent to push them)
ask.footerHint: Number keys to select · confirm · esc to dismiss
